title: Property Consultant - Knight Frank India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Knight Frank India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
